urdu transliteration text:
Tukde Kisi Shaheed Ka Aise Badan Na Ho
Ghatdi Mein Laash Rakhi Ho Laikin Kafan Na Ho
chopped like this
english translation text:
May the corpse of a martyr never be
That the corpse be wrapped in a sack but have no shroud

urdu transliteration text:
Bewa Hasan Ki Kahti This Qasim Ke Laash Per
Betaa Kisi Ka Is Tarha Maan Se Juda Na Ho
english translation text:
The widow of Hasan bemoaned at
the corpse of Qasim
May no son ever be separated from his mother in such a way

urdu transliteration text:
Jis Tarha Tukde Laash-e-qasim Ke Hogaye
Paamal Yun Jahaan Mein Laasha Kio Na Ho
english translation text:
As chopped as the corpse of Qasim was
May no corpse in this world ever be mutilated

urdu transliteration text:
Ghurbat Mein Ya Khuda Koi Sadmaa Mila Na Ho
Pardes Mein Yun Kisi Se Beta Juda Na Ho
such grief in a foreign land
english translation text:
O Lord!  May no one be afflicted by
May no one be separated from her son
away in a foreign land

urdu transliteration text:
Lutaa Gaya Hai Jis Tarha Gulshan Rasool Ka
Ya Rab Tabah Iss Tarha Koi Chaman Na Ho
english translation text:
As the Prophet’s gardens were looted
O Lord! May no garden ever be looted

urdu transliteration text:
Sardar-e-ambiya Ke Nawase Ke Waste
Ummat Ke Paas Dene Ko Do Gaz Kafan Na Ho
Master of Prophets
english translation text:
For the sake of the grandson of the
Can the nation not spare two yards of
cloth for a shroud?

urdu transliteration text:
Sab Ko Lahad Naseeb Ho Sab Ko Kafan Mile
Afsos Dafn Laasha-e-shah-e-zaman Na Ho
Everyone gets a grave,
everyone gets a shroud
english translation text: Woe, but the corpse of the Master of the Times remains unburied

urdu transliteration text:
Bacha Jo Kahiin Roya To Baanu Ne Di Sada
Logo Kahiin Ye Asghar-e-guncha Dahan Na Ho
Wherever a child cried, Baanu called out
english translation text: O people! Is this not the toothless Asghar?
